notes: Phase 5 (Sunwell Plateau) Best in Slot from the Icy Veins TBC Classic Shadow Priest Dps gear guide — sourced from the original 2007-2008 Burning Crusade release (drafted ahead of the TBC Anniversary realm reaching this content, same approach as p3/p4). Enchants show the top-ranked pick per slot; the guide page lists further ranked alternatives. Gems are the general class/role recommendation from the guide's gemming section.

gems.name: Mystical Skyfire Diamond (+16 spell crit, +2% shadow damage) — or Ember Skyfire Diamond
Runed Living Ruby (+8 spell damage) — or Runed Crimson Spinel
Potent Noble Topaz (+4 spell damage / +4 crit) — or Veiled Noble Topaz/Pyrestone if short on hit
Glowing Nightseye (+4 spell damage / +6 spirit) — or Glowing Shadowsong Amethyst
